description_long: This is a classic chessboard set on a thick, rectangular wooden base with a smooth, polished finish. The playing surface features a standard 8x8 grid of alternating black and white squares, sharply defined and evenly spaced. The chessboard is populated with a full set of chess pieces, with white pieces on one side and black pieces on the other, each piece detailed and distinct in form. The border of the board is wide, flat, and made of a rich brown wood, providing a sturdy frame around the checkered playing area. The chess pieces are traditional in style, with recognizable forms for pawns, rooks, knights, bishops, queens, and kings. The overall appearance is elegant and functional, suitable for both casual and competitive play in public urban spaces such as parks or plazas.
description: A classic wooden chessboard with a polished brown border and a standard black-and-white checkered playing surface, complete with a full set of detailed chess pieces. The board is elegant and sturdy, ideal for public or recreational use.
description_view_0: The chessboard is viewed from the white side, showing all white pieces in the foreground and black pieces in the background, with the polished wooden border clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the alignment of the chess pieces along the left and right edges, emphasizing the depth of the board and the thickness of the wooden border.
description_view_2: The board is seen from the black side, with black pieces in the foreground and white pieces in the background, offering a clear view of the checkered pattern and the symmetry of the setup.
description_view_3: A side view from the opposite edge, showing the chess pieces lined up along the sides and the smooth, wide wooden border framing the board.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface consists of a regular grid of 64 squares arranged in an 8x8 pattern, with alternating black and white squares forming a classic checkered design. The squares are perfectly square and evenly spaced, with sharp, clean edges and no decorative elements or inscriptions within the grid itself.
attribute_border_design: The border is a wide, flat frame made of polished brown wood, surrounding the entire playing area. It is smooth and unadorned, with no visible ornamentation, inscriptions, or markings, providing a simple yet elegant contrast to the checkered pattern of the board.
